arts.ttl: Talks held: Major update on future of £70m Liverpool and Chelsea transfer target
arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea may be disappointed to learn that Nottingham Forest are reportedly in talks over tying star defender Murillo down to a new contract. arts.ttl: Spurs trigger extension in Son contract until 2026
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur trigger an option to extend forward Son Heung-min's contract by a year, until the summer of 2026.

arts.ttl: 'Beat Liverpool and Forest are in the title race'
arts.sum: When Nottingham Forest face Liverpool at the City Ground next week it will be a top-of-the-table match that barely anyone could have predicted back in August.

arts.ttl: Report names Man United, Chelsea & Liverpool as suitors for £40million transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United, Chelsea and Liverpool have all been named as potential suitors for Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez. It is not yet entirely clear what the future holds for the Hungary international, but he’s impressed in his time in the Premier League and it’s not surprising to see big clubs showing an interest in him. arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot to drop Trent Alexander-Arnold, start Conor Bradley in EFL Cup semi-final?
arts.sum: Arne Slot faces a selection dilemma at right-back ahead of Liverpool's trip to London where they take on Tottenham Hotspur in the semi-final of the EFL Cup on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: 'More insistent': Tottenham are pushing harder than Man United to sign £50m player this month - Romano

arts.ttl: Arne Slot could finally unleash Liverpool transfer that may have come six months too late
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has made just four appearances for Liverpool since joining the Reds from Juventus last summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool without one player for Tottenham but have doubts over two more
